title: Hello Monday

posts.author: Lissiny (LISSINY AQUINO)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to know when you are going to have the Update form for specific item. See more details below:

Sending and Email with Superform integrations
*There is a bug what the emails won’t populate the data from the board as selected.
We currently working on it with monday support

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lissiny,

This app is owned by the Superform developers, so we are unable to share concrete details on bug fixes directly. We recommend reaching out to the developers via their email for specific updates - rnd@spot-nik.com.

Thank you in advance for your understanding!
